_comment: Ground truth for M1.4 STEP import fixtures. Authored and committed by the human maintainer (fixture discipline, AGENT_PROMPTS §4; provenance rule, DECISIONS.md 2026-07-04). Agents assert against these values; they do not edit this file. Units: mm, mm^3 (both files declare millimetre length units). Unlike the STL fixtures, STEP is exact B-rep: analytic volumes are the correct targets, and tessellated-mesh volumes must CONVERGE toward them as tessellation deflection tightens. Files exported from Shapr3D (AP242 schema); importer must not assume AP214.

cube.step.tessellated_volume_note: A planar-faced solid tessellates exactly: mesh volume must equal 1000.0 within 1e-6 relative at ANY deflection.
cube.step._note: 10x10x10 mm cube. NOT centered at the origin: Shapr3D exported it offset in Y (min/max Y = -5.384615385 / 4.615384615, extent exactly 10 at stored precision). Tests must use this bounding box, not assume symmetric placement. Watertight after tessellation: true.

cylinder.step.convergence_note: Tessellated volume is ALWAYS below the analytic value (inscribed flat facets) and must increase monotonically toward it as deflection tightens. ROADMAP M1.4 requires demonstrating this across 3 deflection values, with the finest within 0.1% (rel 1e-3) of 1570.7963267948966. Do not pin an exact tessellated volume: it depends on OCCT's mesher version. Assert convergence + final tolerance instead.
cylinder.step.bounding_box_note: Curved-face bbox from a tessellation may be marginally inside the analytic box in X/Y (chords lie inside the true circle); assert within +/-0.01 mm, not exact equality. Z is exact.
cylinder.step._note: Radius 5 mm (CYLINDRICAL_SURFACE r=5), height 20 mm (z: 0 to 20), axis +Z. 3 B-rep faces: two planar caps + lateral cylindrical face. Watertight after tessellation: true.
